company.description: Companies allow you to represent commercial organizations using your product

lead.description: Leads are useful for representing logged-out users of your application

user.description: The Users resource is the primary way of interacting with Intercom

id.description: The Intercom defined ID representing the Lead

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

email.description: The email address of the lead

phone.description: The phone number of the lead

selectBy.description: What property to use to query the company

id.description: The Intercom defined ID representing the company

userId.description: Automatically generated identifier for the Lead

companyId.description: The company_id you have given to the company

updateBy.description: The property via which to query the lead

id.description: The Intercom defined ID representing the Lead

userId.description: Automatically generated identifier for the Lead
A unique string identifier for the user. It is required on creation if an email is not supplied.

email.description: The user's email address. It is required on creation if a user_id is not supplied.

avatar.description: An avatar image URL. note: the image URL needs to be https.

companies.description: Identifies the companies this user belongs to. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

phone.description: The phone number of the user

sessionCount.description: How many sessions the user has recorded

unsubscribedFromEmails.description: Whether the Lead is unsubscribed from emails

updateLastRequestAt.description: Whether to instruct Intercom to update the users last_request_at value to the current API service time in UTC. default value if not sent is false.

utmCampaign.description: Identifies a specific product promotion or strategic campaign

utmContent.description: Identifies what specifically was clicked to bring the user to the site

utmMedium.description: Identifies what type of link was used

utmSource.description: An avatar image URL. note: the image URL needs to be https.

industry.description: The industry that this company operates in

monthlySpend.description: The phone number of the user

plan.description: The name of the plan you have associated with the company

size.description: The number of employees in this company

website.description: The URL for this company's website. Please note that the value specified here is not validated. Accepts any string.

customAttributesJson.description: A hash of key/value pairs to represent custom data you want to attribute to a user

customAttributesUi.description: A hash of key/value pairs to represent custom data you want to attribute to a user

id.description: The Intercom defined ID representing the Lead

userId.description: Automatically generated identifier for the Lead

id.description: The Intercom defined ID representing the company

companyId.description: The company_id you have given to the company
The company ID you have defined for the company
